features: Your Skin Barrier Complex - Be kind to your skin with our fast-absorbing face serum.
Our serum is specially designed to support, protect and replenish the skin's natural barrier, perfect for dry & sensitve skin.
Specially formulated with our skin barrier complex of 5 Ceramides and can be used AM and PM.
description: Product Description Be kind to your skin with our very light and fast-absorbing face serum, ideal for dry and sensitive skin. Formulated with our skin barrier complex of 5 Ceramides, moisture-locking hyaluronic acid, soothing, oats, Glycerin and Vitamin E, our serum is designed to support, protect and replenish the skin barrier. Apply daily for optimal hydration, balance and skin health. Give your skin the extra care it deserves! Vegan Friendly & Fragrance Free. Ingredients Aqua, Glyceryl Stearate, Butylene Glycol, Erythritol, Fructooligosaccharides, Avena Sativa (Oat) Kernel Extract, Ceramide NP, Ceramide NS, Ceramide NG, Ceramide AS, Ceramide EOP, Ceramide AP, Tocopherol, Sodium Hyaluronate, Glycerin, C14-22 Alcohols, PEG-100 Stearate, Sodium Polyacryloyldimethyl Taurate, Caprylyl Methicone, Sodium Benzoate, C12-20 Alkyl Glucoside, C30-45 Alkyl Cetearyl Dimethicone Crosspolymer, Isohexadecane, PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate, Phenoxyethanol, 1,2-Hexanediol, Hydrogenated Lecithin, Propylene Glycol, Castor Oil Hydrogenated Ethoxylated, Ethylhexylglycerin. Directions Can be used either morning or evening. In the morning, apply a few drops of the serum directly on to the face before applying makeup. Gently massage in to the skin until fully absorbed. In the evening, apply a few drops of the serum directly on to cleansed, dry skin. Gently massage in to the skin until fully absorbed and leave on overnight. Safety Warning Avoid direct contact with eyes. Manufacturer Contact Information Produced for: Quest Personal Care Global Ltd, BL9 9NB, UK. Quest Personal Care (Ireland), #154, 20 Harcourt Street, Dublin, D02 H364, Ireland. See more
